answers: Warehousing = storing goods between production and distribution. Key metrics: inventory accuracy, order fulfillment speed, space utilization.
Types: public (shared), private (owned), distribution center (high throughput), cold storage (temperature controlled).
Management tips: organize by velocity (fast-moving items near shipping), use WMS software, maintain FIFO rotation, and keep aisles clear.
Warehouse efficiency: use barcode/RFID scanning, implement pick-pack-ship workflow, cross-dock when possible.
